summaryAm: አንዲት ልዕልት ረጅም እረፍት ከወሰደች በኋላ በጓደኞች እና በቤተሰብ ደስታ የምትነቃበት ተለሳለሰ ታሪክ።
moralAm: በጸጥታ መጠበቅ እና ተስፋን መያዝ አዲስ ጠዋትን ያመጣል።

source.name: Public-domain classic
source.notes: Traditional/public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation with softened themes for ages 3-6.

pages.textAm: በቆንጆ ቤተመንግሥት ውስጥ ደግ ልዕልት ትኖር ነበር። ቤተሰቧ እና ጓደኞቿ በቀስታ በቀስታ ያሳድጓት ነበር።
pages.textEn: A kind princess lived in a beautiful castle.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A kind young princess with family and friends in a warm castle.

pages.textAm: በበዓል ቀን ሁሉም መልካም ምኞት አመጡላት። አንዱ ጥበብን፣ ሌላው ደግነትን፣ ሌላውም ትዕግሥትን ተመኘላት።
pages.textEn: At a celebration, everyone brought kind wishes.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A gentle castle celebration with people offering kind wishes to the princess.

pages.textAm: ልዕልቷ እያደገች አበቦችን መንከባከብ እና ለሰዎች በጥሩ ቃል መናገር ትወድ ነበር።
pages.textEn: The princess grew up loving flowers and kind words.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The princess caring for flowers in a sunny castle garden.

pages.textAm: አንድ ቀን በአትክልቱ ውስጥ ሲዞር በጣም ደከመች። ሐኪሞች እና ቤተሰቧ ‘ረጅም እረፍት ያስፈልጋታል’ አሉ።
pages.textEn: One day she became very tired and needed a long rest.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The tired princess being cared for gently by family in the castle garden.

pages.textAm: ልዕልቷ በጸጥ ያለ ክፍል ውስጥ አረፈች። ቤተመንግሥቱም ድምፁን አሳነሰ፣ ሁሉም በተስፋ ጠበቀ።
pages.textEn: The princess rested in a quiet room while everyone waited with hope.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The princess resting peacefully in a soft quiet castle room.

pages.textAm: ከመስኮቷ ውጭ አበቦች በቀስታ በቀሉ። ጓደኞቿ በየቀኑ ውሃ አጠጡአቸው እና ለልዕልቷ መልካም ቃላትን ተናገሩ።
pages.textEn: Her friends watered flowers and spoke kind words each day.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Friends watering flowers outside the princess's castle window.

pages.textAm: ወቅቶች ተቀያየሩ። ፀሐይ ወጣች፣ ዝናብ ወረደ፣ አበቦቹም የተስፋ ቀለም ይዘው ቀጠሉ።
pages.textEn: Seasons passed while hope stayed alive.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Castle flowers through changing seasons, gentle hopeful mood.

pages.textAm: አንድ ብሩህ ጠዋት ወፎች በመስኮቷ አጠገብ ዘመሩ። ልዕልቷ ዓይኖቿን በቀስታ ከፈተች።
pages.textEn: One bright morning, birds sang and the princess woke gently.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Birds singing near the castle window as the princess wakes gently.

pages.textAm: ቤተሰቧ እና ጓደኞቿ በደስታ ተቀበሏት። ማንም አልቸኮለም፤ ሁሉም በቀስታ እንድትመለስ ረዳት።
pages.textEn: Her family and friends welcomed her gently and joyfully.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Family and friends warmly welcoming the princess as she wakes.

pages.textAm: በአትክልቱ ውስጥ ትንሽ የእንኳን ደህና መጣሽ በዓል አደረጉ። ልዕልቷ በቀስታ ፈገግ አለች፣ ሁሉም ግን እንዳትደክም በርጋታ ነበሩ።
pages.textEn: They held a gentle welcome celebration in the garden.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A gentle garden celebration for the princess with family and flowers.

pages.textAm: በየቀኑ ትንሽ ትንሽ ጥንካሬዋ ተመለሰ። አንድ ቀን አበባ አጠጣች፣ ሌላ ቀን ለልጆች በለስላሳ ድምፅ ታሪክ ነገረች።
pages.textEn: Each day she grew stronger and returned to small kind routines.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The princess watering flowers and telling a gentle story to children in a sunny garden.

pages.textAm: ከዚያ ቤተመንግሥቱ ትንሽ በዓል አደረገ። ሁሉም ተስፋ፣ ትዕግሥት እና በቀስታ መንከባከብ አዲስ ጠዋትን እንደሚያመጡ አስታወሱ።
pages.textEn: The castle celebrated hope, patience, and gentle care.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A gentle castle garden celebration with the princess, family, friends, and flowers.
